title: taraxacum infumatum
intro: Taraxacum infumatum, also known as the yellow salsify or yellow goat's beard, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a digestive aid and anti-inflammatory agent, due to its high content of inulin, a prebiotic fiber. The health benefits of Taraxacum infumatum include improving digestion, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Taraxacum infumatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
